caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" and a cap with headphones over it. The setting appears to be a clothing store, as evidenced by the racks of clothes and mannequins in the background. The walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the environment. The man seems engaged and animated, possibly laughing or reacting to something amusing during the conversation. The overall atmosphere suggests a casual yet professional discussion in a unique, retail-inspired setting.
